The nine deities situated in the outer compartments beginning
with the one at the north-eastern corner and ending with the south-
eastern arc : Sikhin, Parjanya, Jayanta, Indra, Surya, Satya, Bhfsa,
Antarik§a and Anila (or Anala). Then follow in order Pusan,
Vitatha, Bj-hatksata, Yama, Gandharva, Bhrfigaraja, Mrga and
Pitr on the south to the south-western corner. Then come regularly
in the west Dauvarika, Sugriva, Kusumadanta, Varuna, Asura,
So?a, Papayaksman and Roga ending in the north-western corner.
Thereafter there are Ahi, Mukhya, Bhallaja, Soma, Bhujaga, Aditi
and Diti in the north in regular order, the total number being 32.
[Instead of ftrfsr, srftvT and and are the
respective variant readings.]
